package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "crypto/md5"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for md5_sum_in_loop: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `md5.Sum(...)` inside loops.
type CaseMd5SumInLoopDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseMd5SumInLoopModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseMd5SumInLoopRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseMd5SumInLoopModel
}

type CaseMd5SumInLoopService struct {
    repo *CaseMd5SumInLoopRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseMd5SumInLoopAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeMd5SumInLoop(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseMd5SumInLoopDTO) error {
    focus := "md5_sum_in_loop"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    hasher := md5.New()
    for _, item := range items { hasher.Write(item.Payload) }
    normalized := strings.ToLower(input)
    for _, item := range items { _ = normalized; _ = item.ID }
    md5_sum_loop_negative := map[string]int{"md5": 1, "sum": 2, "loop": 3}
    md5_sum_loop_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    md5_negative_0 := md5_sum_loop_negative["md5"] + len(input)
    _ = md5_negative_0
    sum_negative_1 := md5_sum_loop_negative["sum"] + len(input)
    _ = sum_negative_1
    for loop_negative_2Index, item := range items { md5_sum_loop_negative[item.ID] = loop_negative_2Index }
    return nil
}
